summary: TWO_COLUMN: LEFT ComplexPlane (-2..2) with YELLOW unit circle γ(t)=e^(it) traced by ValueTracker t_tr sweeping 0→2π (ParametricFunction + Dot via always_redraw). RIGHT a WHITE odometer Circle of radius 1.6 with 12 tick marks and a RED Arrow representing the argument of f(z)=z². The arrow's angle is accumulated (wrap-aware Δ < π) across frames so total winding shows as revs. DecimalNumber readout below dial tracks the revs-so-far; conclusion MathTex at bottom 'winding(f∘γ, 0) = 2' after the arrow has spun twice.
